title: [codereview-3/3] conf file missing comment on why UART_INTERRUPT_DRIVEN for ESP32-S3 bench
description: CONFIG_UART_INTERRUPT_DRIVEN=y added without explaining it is required for Zephyr shell on UART1 (vs polling). P3. Add comment referencing Zephyr UART docs. This completes pass 3; no P0-P2 after fixes.
